title: delphinium fissum subsp. narbonense
intro: Delphinium fissum subsp. narbonense, also known as Narbonese larkspur, is a subspecies of the Delphinium fissum plant, which is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Delphinium fissum subsp. narbonense include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for internal use, or applied topically as a poultice or salve for external use.
